name: insane-search
description: Platform-specific access strategies for AI agents that try public routes for blocked sites without API keys.

interface.shortDescription: Public-page fetch fallback for blocked websites.
interface.longDescription: Insane Search adds a Codex skill and engine for trying public API, feed, TLS impersonation, and browser fallback routes when ordinary web access is blocked.
defaultPrompt: Use Insane Search for this blocked URL.
Summarize this YouTube video with public metadata.
Read this Reddit thread through public feeds.
